meaning: adj.无定形的,没有形状的,形体不明的
examples: You allured him with beauty, made him captive, and crowned the formless death with fadeless form.
Some English vowel sounds which are not given weight in speech become reduced to a rather formless central vowel.
When a person enters a haunted building, the formless spirit belts out an ear-piercing "Uwan!" (hence the name).
The sari, by contrast, is formless and fluid.
